expect: Domains producing human-good knowledge get dispatch boost; net-negative domains get mild penalty

constants.boost_formula: min((ratio - 1.0) * 0.2, SOUL_BOOST_MAX) if good >= threshold and ratio > 1.5
constants.penalty_formula: -min((1.0 - ratio) * 0.2, SOUL_PENALTY_MAX) if bad >= threshold and ratio < 0.5

actual: Two domains boosted (expert-swarm +0.2, operations-research +0.8). Zero penalized — no domain has ratio < 0.5 with >= 5 bad AND >= 5 bad threshold. Meta (ratio 0.67) escapes penalty because threshold is 0.5.
diff: Expected measurable rank changes: CONFIRMED for expert-swarm (#4→#3). operations-research boost is larger than expected (+0.8 max). No penalties is a surprise — governance (0.00 ratio) has 0 good + 5 bad but 0 < 5 good threshold. Conservative thresholds mean penalties require extreme badness.
